FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class FlyoutButton

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI Flyout: a button that opens an anchored, light-dismissable flyout holding arbitrary content (not a menu). Opens through the shared overlay service (OverlayHost) exactly like DropDownButton; the host wraps the body in the acrylic FlyoutSurface (the FlyoutPresenterBackground acrylic + 1px FlyoutBorderThemeBrush stroke + elevation shadow + OverlayCornerRadius corners + the MenuPopupThemeTransition reveal), and captures/restores focus on open/close. The body returned by the content thunk is the WinUI FlyoutPresenter card: FlyoutContentPadding 16,15,16,17 with the Flyout*Theme min/max constraints. Toggling re-click closes it (WinUI Flyout toggle semantics). Light dismiss + Escape are host-provided.

public sealed class FlyoutButton : Component

OpenOnMount

Field Value

bool

Placement

Placement of the flyout relative to its anchor. Defaults to BottomLeft (the positioner flips above the anchor when it does not fit below).

public FlyoutPlacement Placement

Field Value

FlyoutPlacement

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
